description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests, on push to the master branch, and can be manually triggered. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest with a 10-minute timeout to test with Python 3.9 and 3.13. For each Python version, check out the code, set up Python with pip caching, install the package and its dev dependencies, run pre-commit checks, and upload generated test data as an artifact with 9-day retention.
